recommendations: Expand JOURNAL-04 and JOURNAL-05 ui_refs during implement using ir/slices/bTHDb____root.json subtree under entry-detail-popup (ai_RNbBHXkh) and milestones-tab-content (ai_RNbBHXjO) — anchor ids alone risk missing badge rows, delete-confirm, and relapse disclaimer groups.
Add AC or layout_notes for PopupClosed form-reset parity (bTIYE/bTIYM ResetGroup workflows) on new-entry and entry-detail popups.
Clarify JOURNAL-04 ENUM-03 depends_on: cite state_energy_level_os / state_nervous_system_os in scope if required, or remove dependency.
Land SHELL-07 and DS-01 before JOURNAL-01; wire popup open/close events across JOURNAL-02 → JOURNAL-03/04/06/07 chain.

critiques.finding: JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection lists 11 ui_refs for entry-detail-popup (ai_RNbBHXkh) while layout_notes cite ~55 entities; ACs name generate-reflection-btn and delete-confirm-section but omit ai_RNbBHXlL, ai_RNbBHXla, ai_RNbBHXkl, and ai-reflection-disclaimer (ai_RNbBHXlQ) from ui_refs.
critiques.alternative: Expand ui_refs to include reflection header row (ai_RNbBHXlF), generate-reflection-btn (ai_RNbBHXlL), ai-reflection-text (ai_RNbBHXlP), disclaimer (ai_RNbBHXlQ), and delete-confirm subtree (ai_RNbBHXlX/ai_RNbBHXle), or cite ir/slices/bTHDb____root.json pointer for ai_RNbBHXkh subtree in layout_notes.

critiques.finding: JOURNAL-05-milestones-and-relapse-list and JOURNAL-02-journal-entries-list use ~10 anchor ui_refs each for RepeatingGroup regions (~38 and ~20 entities per layout_notes) without card-internal ids (e.g. milestone-card-meta ai_RNbBHXjc–ai_RNbBHXjk, relapse-private-badge ai_RNbBHXjs, journal-entries-label ai_RNbBHXiq).
critiques.alternative: Add ui_refs for actions-row siblings (ai_RNbBHXip/ai_RNbBHXiq), milestone card date/meta groups, and relapse divider (ai_RNbBHXjr) or document full RG cell template paths from inventory under ai_RNbBHXjb/ai_RNbBHXjz.

critiques.finding: JOURNAL-03-new-entry-popup layout_notes reference create workflows bTIYE/bTIYG cluster and slice includes PopupClosed workflows (bTIYE, bTIYM, bTIYK, bTIYS) with ResetGroup actions, but no AC requires form reset on popup close/cancel matching Bubble behavior.
critiques.alternative: Add AC-4 requiring new-entry and entry-detail popups reset bound fields on close/cancel per bTIYE/bTIYM workflow parity, or document intentional Vue v-model reset as equivalent.

critiques.finding: JOURNAL-04-entry-detail-and-ai-reflection depends_on ENUM-03-path-coaching-and-state-enums but item scope and ACs do not reference path_enrollment_status, ai_coaching_mode_os, or state_* enums; dependency appears speculative for AI reflection unless mood/state labels consume ENUM-03 maps.
critiques.alternative: Remove ENUM-03 from JOURNAL-04 depends_on, or add scope/AC clause binding reflection/mood UI to state_energy_level_os / state_nervous_system_os from ENUM-03.

critiques.finding: All seven items state frontend migration but omit explicit out-of-scope lines for project/ writes and provider-adapter routes per implementation-constraints checklist; only JOURNAL-02 AC-2 mentions no project/ schema edits.
critiques.alternative: Append one-line out-of-scope clause per item: no project/supabase mutations; adapter only if server secret required (journal CRUD should use Supabase client from frontend).
